introSection: Sky Swirl (Chinese: 天地回旋) was a steel shuttle roller coaster located at Lewa Adventure in Jingyang, Xianyang, Shaanxi, China.

sections.title: History
sections.content:
The unpainted structure of the ride was complete by July 2014. The painting of the track and supports was completed circa November. The ride opened in 2015.

Sky Swirl reportedly closed by 2016. The ride remained visible in satellite imagery until it was assumedly removed in 2018.

sections.title: Design
sections.content:
This roller coaster is an installation of Beijing Shibaolai Amusement Equipment's Boomerang model, which is a copy of Vekoma's Boomerang.

Orange track with blue supports.

fullText:
Sky Swirl (Chinese: 天地回旋) was a steel shuttle roller coaster located at Lewa Adventure in Jingyang, Xianyang, Shaanxi, China.

The unpainted structure of the ride was complete by July 2014. The painting of the track and supports was completed circa November. The ride opened in 2015.

Sky Swirl reportedly closed by 2016. The ride remained visible in satellite imagery until it was assumedly removed in 2018.

This roller coaster is an installation of Beijing Shibaolai Amusement Equipment's Boomerang model, which is a copy of Vekoma's Boomerang.

Orange track with blue supports.
